title: crotalaria spectabilis
intro: Crotalaria spectabilis, also known as the showy rattlebox, is a flowering plant species in the pea family Fabaceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its seeds, which contain a compound called rotenone, a natural insecticide. The seeds have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Crotalaria spectabilis seeds are often used in traditional medicine, where they can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness their health benefits.
